coding.display: Migraine, unspecified, not intractable, without status migrainosus

note.text: Developed generalized maculopapular rash within 2 hours of first dose of amoxicillin. Rash resolved within 48 hours after discontinuation.

dosageInstruction.text: Take 50mg by mouth at onset of migraine. May repeat once after 2 hours if needed. Maximum 200mg in 24 hours.
Chew one 5mg tablet by mouth once daily at bedtime
Inhale 2 puffs every 4-6 hours as needed for wheezing or shortness of breath. Use spacer with mask.
